name: @yieldcraft/screenshot-paste
description_en: pi-web plugin that browses and previews screenshots saved by pi-web into .pi-web/paste/ — gallery panel, lightbox, and chat-inline previews for folder-mode attachments.
description_zh: pi-web 插件，用于浏览和预览保存在 .pi-web/paste/ 中的截图 — 文件夹模式附件的画廊面板、灯箱和聊天内联预览
